citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany the APHIS Official during the inspection process at 11:20am on
Wednesday, February 11, 2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee by knocking on the door. The inspector
was informed by a family member who called the licensee at work that he was unable to leave work to facilitate the
inspection. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and
regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.126(b) 
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany the APHIS Official during the inspection process at 11:20am on 
Wednesday, February 11, 2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee by knocking on the door. The inspector 
was informed by a family member who called the licensee at work that he was unable to leave work to facilitate the 
inspection. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and 
regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
